parameters.query:
SELECT
  -- Leads
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day') as nouveaux_leads_hier,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE statut = 'qualifie') as leads_qualifies_total,
  -- Devis
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM devis WHERE date_envoi >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days') as devis_semaine,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(montant_ttc), 0) FROM devis WHERE statut = 'envoye') as pipeline_devis,
  -- Factures
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(montant_ttc), 0) FROM factures WHERE statut = 'payee' AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date_paiement) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM NOW())) as ca_mois,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(montant_ttc), 0) FROM factures WHERE statut IN ('en_attente', 'en_retard')) as impayes_total,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM factures WHERE statut = 'en_retard') as factures_retard,
  -- RDV
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rendez_vous WHERE date_debut::date = CURRENT_DATE) as rdv_aujourd_hui,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rendez_vous WHERE date_debut >= NOW() AND date_debut < NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days') as rdv_semaine,
  -- Clients
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clients WHERE statut = 'actif') as clients_actifs

SELECT rv.titre, rv.date_debut, rv.lieu, c.nom, c.prenom, c.entreprise
FROM rendez_vous rv
JOIN clients c ON rv.client_id = c.id
WHERE rv.date_debut::date = CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY rv.date_debut

SELECT prenom, nom, entreprise, score, probabilite_signature, action_recommandee
FROM leads
WHERE priorite = 'haute' AND statut NOT IN ('perdu', 'signe')
ORDER BY score DESC
LIMIT 5

values.content: Tu es l'assistant de direction d'une entreprise de développement web. Rédige un briefing matinal concis et actionnable. Commence par une phrase d'accroche sur la situation du jour. Sois direct, chiffré, et donne 3 priorités concrètes pour la journée. Utilise des emojis pour les titres.
